## **Dashboard Screenshots**

This document contains the final screenshots of the Hotel Reservation Analysis Dashboard developed in Power BI. Each page highlights different business insights derived from the hotel reservation dataset.

Pages included:

**1\. Executive Overview**

![][image1]

Displays key performance indicators including Total Bookings, Cancelled Bookings, Cancellation Rate, Average Room Price, Average Lead Time, and Repeat Guest Rate. It also includes booking trends by month and market segment.

**2\. Cancellation Analysis**

![][image2]

Provides insights into booking cancellations based on lead time, room type, meal plan, and market segment.

**3\. Revenue & Pricing Analysis**

![][image3]  
Analyzes average room prices, pricing trends by month, room type, and the relationship between pricing and booking cancellations.

**4\. Customer Insights** 

![][image4]

Shows customer composition, repeat versus new guests, customer segments, and guest distribution.

**Conclusion**

The completed dashboard provides an interactive view of hotel reservation data through KPIs, charts, and slicers. It enables users to analyze booking trends, cancellations, pricing, and customer behavior effectively.
